_comment: Objetivos de TI4 (Públicos y Secretos). Fuente: PDF Player Components (oficial). Los Stage I valen 1 VP, Stage II valen 2 VP. Los Secret Objectives siempre valen 1 VP.

rules.publicObjectives: Scored during the Scoring step of the Status Phase (except via Imperial strategy card). Max 1 public objective per player per Status Phase. 'Spend' objectives refer to spending during the Status Phase, not during Action Phase. A player cannot score public objectives if they don't control each planet in their home system.
rules.secretObjectives: Worth 1 VP each. Setup: each player is dealt 2, keeps 1. Max 3 total (scored or unscored) in play area. May be scored during Action, Status, or Agenda phase as specified. No home system control required (unlike public objectives).
rules.notes: The Wormhole Nexus and the Ghosts of Creuss' home system are on the edge of the game board for the purpose of scoring objectives.

stageI.name: Corner the Market
stageI.condition: Control 4 planets that each have the same planet trait.

stageI.name: Develop Weaponry
stageI.condition: Own 2 unit upgrade technologies.

stageI.name: Diversify Research
stageI.condition: Own 2 technologies in each of 2 colors.

stageI.name: Erect a Monument
stageI.condition: Spend 8 resources.

stageI.name: Expand Borders
stageI.condition: Control 6 planets in non-home systems.

stageI.name: Found Research Outposts
stageI.condition: Control 3 planets that have technology specialties.

stageI.name: Intimidate Council
stageI.condition: Have 1 or more ships in 2 systems that are adjacent to Mecatol Rex's System.

stageI.name: Lead from the Front
stageI.condition: Spend a total of 3 tokens from your tactic and/or strategy pools.

stageI.name: Negotiate Trade Routes
stageI.condition: Spend 5 trade goods.

stageI.name: Sway the Council
stageI.condition: Spend 8 influence.

stageI.name: Amass Wealth
stageI.condition: Spend 3 influence, 3 resources, and 3 trade goods.

stageI.name: Build Defenses
stageI.condition: Have 4 or more structures.

stageI.name: Discover Lost Outposts
stageI.condition: Control 2 planets that have attachments.

stageI.name: Engineer a Marvel
stageI.condition: Have your flagship or a war sun on the game board.

stageI.name: Explore Deep Space
stageI.condition: Have units in 3 systems that do not contain planets.

stageI.name: Improve Infrastructure
stageI.condition: Have structures on 3 planets outside of your home system.

stageI.name: Make History
stageI.condition: Have units in 2 systems that contain legendary planets, Mecatol Rex, or anomalies.

stageI.name: Populate the Outer Rim
stageI.condition: Have units in 3 systems on the edge of the game board other than your home system.

checkParams.note: 'Edge of the game board' depends on the specific map layout/player count, not just adjacency — needs mapGeneration.ts's ring/position data cross-referenced, not guessed here.

stageI.name: Push Boundaries
stageI.condition: Control more planets than each of 2 of your neighbors.

stageI.name: Raise a Fleet
stageI.condition: Have 5 or more non-fighter ships in 1 system.

stageII.name: Centralize Galactic Trade
stageII.condition: Spend 10 trade goods.

stageII.name: Conquer the Weak
stageII.condition: Control 1 planet that is in another player's home system.

stageII.name: Form Galactic Brain Trust
stageII.condition: Control 5 planets that have technology specialties.

stageII.name: Found a Golden Age
stageII.condition: Spend 16 resources.

stageII.name: Galvanize the People
stageII.condition: Spend a total of 6 tokens from your tactic and/or strategy pools.

stageII.name: Manipulate Galactic Law
stageII.condition: Spend 16 influence.

stageII.name: Master the Sciences
stageII.condition: Own 2 technologies in each of 4 colors.

stageII.name: Revolutionize Warfare
stageII.condition: Own 3 unit upgrade technologies.

stageII.name: Subdue the Galaxy
stageII.condition: Control 11 planets in non-home systems.

stageII.name: Unify the Colonies
stageII.condition: Control 6 planets that each have the same planet trait.

stageII.name: Achieve Supremacy
stageII.condition: Have your flagship or a war sun in another player's home system or the Mecatol Rex system.

stageII.name: Become a Legend
stageII.condition: Have units in 4 systems that contain legendary planets, Mecatol Rex, or anomalies.

stageII.name: Command an Armada
stageII.condition: Have 8 or more non-fighter ships in 1 system.

stageII.name: Construct Massive Cities
stageII.condition: Have 7 or more structures.

stageII.name: Control the Borderlands
stageII.condition: Have units in 5 systems on the edge of the game board other than your home system.

checkParams.note: 'Edge of the game board' depends on the specific map layout/player count, not just adjacency — needs mapGeneration.ts's ring/position data cross-referenced, not guessed here.

stageII.name: Hold Vast Reserves
stageII.condition: Spend 6 influence, 6 resources, and 6 trade goods.

stageII.name: Patrol Vast Territories
stageII.condition: Have units in 5 systems that do not contain planets.

stageII.name: Protect the Border
stageII.condition: Have structures on 5 planets outside of your home system.

stageII.name: Reclaim Ancient Monuments
stageII.condition: Control 3 planets that have attachments.

stageII.name: Rule Distant Lands
stageII.condition: Control 2 planets that are each in or adjacent to a different, other player's home system.

checkParams.note: Control 2 planets each in/adjacent to a DIFFERENT other player's home system — cross-referencing multiple distinct opponents' homes, not worth a one-off checkType yet.

actionPhase.name: Destroy Their Greatest Ship
actionPhase.condition: Destroy another player's war sun or flagship.

actionPhase.name: Make an Example of Their World
actionPhase.condition: Use BOMBARDMENT to destroy the last of a player's ground forces on a planet.

omega.condition: Destroy the last of a player's ground forces on a planet during the bombardment step.

actionPhase.name: Spark a Rebellion
actionPhase.condition: Win a combat against a player who has the most victory points.

actionPhase.name: Turn Their Fleets to Dust
actionPhase.condition: Use SPACE CANNON to destroy the last of a player's ships in a system.

omega.condition: Destroy the last of a player's non-fighter ships in the active system during the space cannon offense step.

actionPhase.name: Unveil Flagship
actionPhase.condition: Win a space combat in a system that contains your flagship. You cannot score this objective if your flagship is destroyed in the combat.

actionPhase.name: Become a Martyr
actionPhase.condition: Lose control of a planet in a home system.

actionPhase.name: Betray a Friend
actionPhase.condition: Win a combat against a player whose promissory note you had in your play area at the start of your tactical action.

actionPhase.name: Brave the Void
actionPhase.condition: Win a combat in an anomaly.

actionPhase.name: Darken the Skies
actionPhase.condition: Win a combat in another player's home system.

actionPhase.name: Demonstrate Your Power
actionPhase.condition: Have 3 or more non-fighter ships in the active system at the end of a space combat.

actionPhase.name: Fight With Precision
actionPhase.condition: Use ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE to destroy the last of a player's fighters in a system.

omega.condition: Destroy the last of a player's fighters in the active system during the anti-fighter barrage step.

actionPhase.name: Prove Endurance
actionPhase.condition: Be the last player to pass during a game round.

statusPhase.name: Adapt New Strategies
statusPhase.condition: Own 2 faction technologies. (Valefar Assimilator technologies do not count toward this objective.)

statusPhase.name: Become the Gatekeeper
statusPhase.condition: Have 1 or more ships in a system that contains an alpha wormhole and 1 or more ships in a system that contains a beta wormhole.

statusPhase.name: Control the Region
statusPhase.condition: Have 1 or more ships in 6 systems.

statusPhase.name: Cut Supply Lines
statusPhase.condition: Have 1 or more ships in the same system as another player's space dock.

statusPhase.name: Establish a Perimeter
statusPhase.condition: Have 4 PDS units on the game board.

statusPhase.name: Forge an Alliance
statusPhase.condition: Control 4 cultural planets.

statusPhase.name: Form a Spy Network
statusPhase.condition: Discard 5 Action Cards.

statusPhase.name: Fuel the War Machine
statusPhase.condition: Have 3 space docks on the game board.

statusPhase.name: Gather a Mighty Fleet
statusPhase.condition: Have 5 dreadnoughts on the game board.

statusPhase.name: Learn the Secrets of the Cosmos
statusPhase.condition: Have 1 or more ships in 3 systems that are each adjacent to an anomaly.

statusPhase.name: Master the Laws of Physics
statusPhase.condition: Own 4 technologies of the same color.

statusPhase.name: Mine Rare Metals
statusPhase.condition: Control 4 hazardous planets.

statusPhase.name: Monopolize Production
statusPhase.condition: Control 4 industrial planets.

statusPhase.name: Occupy the Seat of the Empire
statusPhase.condition: Control Mecatol Rex and have 3 or more ships in its system.

statusPhase.name: Threaten Enemies
statusPhase.condition: Have 1 or more ships in a system that is adjacent to another player's home system.

statusPhase.name: Defy Space and Time
statusPhase.condition: Have units in the wormhole nexus.

statusPhase.name: Destroy Heretical Works
statusPhase.condition: Purge 2 of your relic fragments of any type.

statusPhase.name: Establish Hegemony
statusPhase.condition: Control planets that have a combined influence value of at least 12.

statusPhase.name: Foster Cohesion
statusPhase.condition: Be neighbors with all other players.

statusPhase.name: Hoard Raw Materials
statusPhase.condition: Control planets that have a combined resource value of at least 12.

statusPhase.name: Mechanize the Military
statusPhase.condition: Have 1 mech on each of 4 planets.

statusPhase.name: Occupy the Fringe
statusPhase.condition: Have 9 or more ground forces on a planet that does not contain 1 of your space docks.

statusPhase.name: Produce En Masse
statusPhase.condition: Have units with a combined PRODUCTION value of at least 8 in a single system.

statusPhase.name: Seize An Icon
statusPhase.condition: Control a legendary planet.

statusPhase.name: Stake your Claim
statusPhase.condition: Control a planet in a system that contains a planet controlled by another player.

statusPhase.name: Strengthen Bonds
statusPhase.condition: Have another player's promissory note in your play area.

agendaPhase.name: Dictate Policy
agendaPhase.condition: There are 3 or more laws in play.

agendaPhase.name: Drive the Debate
agendaPhase.condition: You or a planet you control are elected by an agenda.
